detaileddescription.para: Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: A set of possible error codes that the Gaze Recognition system can report.

detaileddescription.para: Blink detected. Both eyes open, close, and open.
User is fixating, eye position is stable.
User is pursuing, eye velocity is low but nonzero.
User is making a saccade, eye velocity is high.
Left eye blink, right eye open.
Right eye blink, left eye open.

briefdescription.para: A set of mutually-exclusive behaviors that the Gaze Recognition system can report.
A set of possible error codes that the Gaze Recognition system can report.
A set of mutually-exclusive behaviors that the Gaze Recognition system can report.
Static information about the Gaze Recognition system. Populate with MLGazeRecognitionGetStaticData().
Information about the state of the Gaze Recognition system. This structure must be initialized by calling MLGazeRecognitionStateInit() before use.

parameterdescription.para: Sets up the version for inout_state and nulls pointer for the MLCoordinateFrameUID.
Sets up the version for inout_state and zeros all the fields.
A pointer to an MLHandle which will contain a handle to Gaze Recognition. If this operation fails, out_handle will be ML_INVALID_HANDLE.
The out_handle parameter was not valid (null).
Gaze Recognition was successfully created.
Perception System has not been started.
The application lacks permission.
Gaze Recognition was not created successfully.
A handle to Gaze Recognition created by MLGazeRecognitionCreate().
The Gaze Recognition handle was not valid.
The Gaze Recognition was successfully destroyed.
Perception System has not been started.
The Gaze Recognition was not successfully destroyed.

briefdescription.para: Get static information about Gaze Recognition.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to Gaze Recognition created by MLGazeRecognitionCreate().
Target to populate the data about Gaze Recognition.
The out_data parameter was not valid (null).
Gaze Recognition static data was successfully received.
Perception System has not been started.
Failed to receive Gaze Recognition static data.

briefdescription.para: Get information about the user's gaze.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to Gaze Recognition created by MLGazeRecognitionCreate().
Information about the gaze.
The out_state parameter was not valid (null).
gaze Recognition state was successfully received.
Perception System has not been started.
Failed to receive gaze Recognition state data.
